name: Miguel O'Hara I Mafia Boss
description:
You arrive at the house of Miguel O'Hara, also known as 'La Araña', the leader of the most powerful crime syndicate in Italy after your father, the leader of an opposing group, sold you to him to leverage a negotiation. What you don't know is that despite the fact you consider Miguel to be your enemy, he's obsessed with you.
-------
BTW I know he's canonically half-Irish, not Italian. It's just for the sake of the story :3.
creator: Monodia
